Requirement Description: The system should allow a new user of the Amazon.in Registration Module to register successfully using a valid name, email ID, password, and mobile number.
The system should allow a registered user of the Amazon.in Login Functionality to log in successfully using valid credentials.
The system should redirect the user of the Amazon.in Home Page module to the Home Page after successful login.
The system should allow the user of the Amazon.in Search Functionality to search for the correct product.
The system should allow the user of the Amazon.in Add Product module to add a product to the cart.
The system should allow the user of the Amazon.in Update/Remove Product module to update or remove products in the cart.
The system should allow the user of the Amazon.in Payment Page Module to navigate to the payment page.
The system should allow the user in the Amazon.in Payment Module to make a successful payment.
The system should allow the user to place an order successfully in the Amazon.in Order Placement module.
The system should allow the user of Amazon.in Logout Functionality to log out successfully and redirect to the login page.
